facts.setting: A masked woman asked Paul whether she was beautiful.
criticalEvents: A masked woman asked Paul whether she was beautiful.
Every answer he gave changed the street around him.
Paul Reeves was an English teacher walking home after the last train when the story began in a quiet commuter district outside Tokyo.
The first reports did not describe an obvious monster or violent attack.
facts.threat: A masked woman asked Paul whether she was beautiful.
facts.primaryReveal: The final warning is therefore simple: when the same impossible detail appears twice, do not wait for a third occurrence to prove that it is real.
facts.finalConsequence: The final warning is therefore simple: when the same impossible detail appears twice, do not wait for a third occurrence to prove that it is real.
facts.unresolvedQuestion: Did Paul Reeves defeat the thing at the centre of the story, or did the encounter simply teach it how to remain hidden?
